expert_rss.title: Iran War Exacerbates the Terrorist Threat Landscape in Europe
expert_rss.summary: The ongoing war in Iran is a disruptive threat multiplier for Europe’s current terrorism landscape. Rather than generating clear-cut, attributable plots, actors affiliated with the Iranian regime are intentionally cultivating an asymmetric grey-zone attack dynamic characterized by ambiguity. This tactical approach mirrors the two foundational conditions of terrorism — intent and opportunity. It is

expert_rss.title: With Talks, the U.S., Lebanon, and Israel Try to Isolate Hezbollah and Iran
expert_rss.summary:
As battles continued to rage between Israel and Lebanese Hezbollah, Israel and Lebanon met on Tuesday, under Washington’s auspices, for their first official talks since 1993.
